name: GAC DLL Load by Office Application
description: Detects the loading of a DLL from the Global Assembly Cache (GAC) by a Microsoft Office application. This is unusual and can indicate an attempt to load malicious code.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the image load event.

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the process loading the DLL.

parameters.name: source_image
parameters.description: The executable image of the Microsoft Office application (e.g., winword.exe, powerpnt.exe, excel.exe, outlook.exe).

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The path to the DLL being loaded from the GAC (e.g., 'C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\assembly\GAC_MSIL\...').

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the DLL was loaded.

parameters.name: signed
parameters.description: Indicates whether the loaded DLL is digitally signed.

parameters.name: signature
parameters.description: The digital signature of the loaded DLL, if available.
